scenarios.purpose: Validate a scripted reference candidate can satisfy trial access before, at, and after trialEnd.
Validate paid activation, currentPeriodEnd access, invoice summary, and retained trial history.
Validate cancel-at-period-end preserves paid access before the boundary and disables it after the boundary.
Validate payment failure moves to grace, keeps access during grace, and denies access after grace.
Validate retry success restores active paid status without losing failure or period history.
Validate duplicate event IDs do not duplicate charges, period extensions, or lifecycle side effects.
Validate fraud suspension overrides all prior access-granting states while preserving history.
Validate scheduled downgrade preserves old entitlements until the period boundary and applies next-plan entitlements after it.
Exercise all cumulative lifecycle commitments through refund or chargeback without provider calls.
